items.headline: AutoZone Supplier Awards And New Mega Hubs Shape Competitive Position
items.summary: AutoZone (NYSE:AZO) recognized top suppliers at its 2026 Vendor Summit, naming Sylvania as Vendor of the Year. The company announced an expansion of its mega hub strategy, with 15 new locations planned to support supply chain and inventory placement. These updates focus on supplier relationships and logistics, areas that can shape service quality and operational resilience for AutoZone.
